options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: goal
options.description:
Lets the user choose the completion goal
Defeat Final Boss - Beat the boss at the end

options.name: progression_option
options.description:
Lets users choose how they wish to progress
Vanilla - Plays the game like normal
Open - Allows you to start from a number of set positions

options.name: open_world_option
options.description:
If you've chosen open world, then select how you would like to begin. You can start
from any of the workshops. Alternatively, it can be randomized
- Magic Hammer (Town City East)
- Junction Point (Town City East)
- Metal Works (Town City East)
- GodHands (Undercity West)
- Keane's Craft (The Keep)
- Work of Art (Catacombs)
- Random (any of them)

options.name: blood_sin_quantity
options.description:
Sets how many Blood Sin Pieces are required to reach the Dome (final boss area).
The same total is added to the item pool and used to scale all intermediate
Blood Sin milestones (break art tiers, chain unlock tiers).

options.name: include_prologue
options.description: Include Prologue checks. 3 simple checks for you going through the prologue if you want to.

options.name: include_time_trial
options.display_name: Include Time Trial Room and Boss Checks
options.description: Include Time Trial Room Checks (DON'T TOUCH THIS, LEAVE IT ON, PLEASE.)

options.name: include_new_game_plus
options.description:
Provides options to include the New Game + content in your run.
ON: Provides you the Rood Inverse immediately allowing you to open all doors.
OFF: Removes the ability to go into any ng+ content
IN_POOL: Provides the Rood Inverse as an item pickup in your item pool.

options.name: include_puzzle_mode_checks
options.description: An optional way to add puzzle mode checks to the game if you really hate yourself (NO IMPLIMENTATION YET)

options.name: item_drop_option
options.description:
There are two types of major choices for how you want the loot to go in the AP World
- "Vanilla"  will give you the item pool from the original game.
- "Heavy" will give you every possible combination of blades, weopons, gems and shields from the
game as well as vanilla.

Both options will use consumables for junk items.

options.name: heavy_drop_limit
options.description: Sets the maxinum number of heavy drop items before you revert back to regular items for junk.

options.name: chest_item_choices
options.description:
Select the kind of items you would like to be served from chests.
Healing Heavy will provide:
- 1 x Cure Bulb
- 1 x Vera Root
- 1 x Alchemist's Reagent

Risk Heavy will provide:
- 1 x Cure Root
- 1 x Vera Bulb
- 1 x Alchemist's Reagent

options.name: boss_item_choices
options.description:
Select the kind of items you would like to be served from boss encounters.
Healing Heavy will provide:
- 1 x Cure Bulb
- 1 x Vera Root
- 1 x Alchemist's Reagent

Risk Heavy will provide:
- 1 x Cure Root
- 1 x Vera Bulb
- 1 x Alchemist's Reagent

options.name: chain_skill_unlock_option
options.description:
Set how you want to unlock chain skills.
vanilla - As it was in the original game with the same values
set - uses a set number per unlock instead, allowing for faster unlocking

options.name: chain_skill_counter
options.description: Set how much BP you need per chain ability unlock - Requires SET in Chain Skill Unlock Option

options.name: break_art_unlock_option
options.description:
Set how you want to unlock break arts.
vanilla - As it was in the original game with the same values
set - uses a set number per unlock instead, allowing for faster unlocking

options.name: break_art_counter
options.description: Set how many points needed per break art unlock - Requires SET in Break Skill Unlock Option

options.name: include_teleport
options.description: Start the game with the teleport spell

options.name: zero_mp_teleport
options.description: The Teleport Spell will be Zero MP cost

options.name: open_teleport_locations
options.display_name: Teleport to any valid save point without finding it first.
options.description: Allow all teleport locations to be available

options.name: roomsanity
options.description: Include every room in the game as a check. If you have put on NG+ options, then it will include those as well.

options.name: panelsanity
options.description: Include every trap floor in the game as a check. If you have put on NG+ options, then it will include those as well.

options.name: deathlink
options.description: Sets if you want deathlink or not

options.name: guaranteed_items
options.description: Guarantees that the specified items will be in the item pool

options.name: local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be in their native world.

options.name: non_local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be outside their native world.

options.name: start_inventory
options.description: Start with the specified amount of these items. Example: "Bomb: 1"

options.name: start_hints
options.description: Start with these item's locations prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: start_location_hints
options.description: Start with these locations and their item prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.
